those stairs are no joke after night shifts tbh
also doubles as a great way to get some exercise every time you forget something upstairs
seen quirky pop-ups where iconic landmarks once stood
classic cinema now turned a vintage shop - wild times!
finding those secret spots sounds ace but when your schedule’s back-to-back work & lectures discover time‘s like hunting unicorns 🦄🕗
homework kinda serves as my unexpected zen zone lol
for real though, gotta find balance else risk burning out 😓 weekends off feel like gold rn
heard some wild tales back home that could give you chills despite knowing they're just old wives' tales - there's always one story that gets under your skin huh?
seen stuff online about places that are popular with locals - think every city's got its own hidden hotspot people love to get freaked out by despite knowing better lol
thin walls mean earplugs are gold rn 😅
wish it was bacon – got fish curry fumes at 6am 😒
ain't nothing like hearing weird noises above you until midnight when you've got early classes...or trying not spill dinner all over yourself after hearing something from upstairs!
thin walls + loud noises next door = no sleep club
every spot now feels samey with their 'unique' vibes – bit much when you’re after just decent wifi & affordable cuppa without pretense. often too loud n crowded when i need some quiet focus tbh
cool idea but where's everyone getting all this café money? 💸
reality reshapes dreams too
managed my finances perfectly last month!
managed not burning popcorn anymore!
timing's just an illusion when juggling responsibilities 📚💼
real adult vibes when u gotta make tough choices 😅 or deciding between priorities - doesn't get more grown-up than those choices!
planning isn't magic tho 😒
expenses are eating up paychecks like there's no tomorrow - saving feels like trying to fill a bottle with holes at the bottom sometimes 🕳💸😅

degree... in reality serving tables - gotta pay bills!

supply and demand won't matter if we can't even produce anything lol

prefix_anonymized: stuff like those stairs are def part of our city's throwback feel - gives off a vibe you're stepping through time - till winter hits n turns them into slides 😅 gotta love that mix of cool looks but lowkey dread when snow shows up!

also doubles as a great way to get some exercise every time you forget something upstairs
seen quirky pop-ups where iconic landmarks once stood
classic cinema now turned a vintage shop - wild times!

homework kinda serves as my unexpected zen zone lol
for real though, gotta find balance else risk burning out 😓 weekends off feel like gold rn
heard some wild tales back home that could give you chills despite knowing they're just old wives' tales - there's always one story that gets under your skin huh?
seen stuff online about places that are popular with locals - think every city's got its own hidden hotspot people love to get freaked out by despite knowing better lol
thin walls mean earplugs are gold rn 😅
wish it was bacon – got fish curry fumes at 6am 😒
ain't nothing like hearing weird noises above you until midnight when you've got early classes...or trying not spill dinner all over yourself after hearing something from upstairs!
thin walls + loud noises next door = no sleep club

reality reshapes dreams too
managed my finances perfectly last month!
managed not burning popcorn anymore!
timing's just an illusion when juggling responsibilities 📚💼

economics = organizing scarce resources, basically a challenge

supply and demand won't matter if we can't even produce anything lol
every crumbling system needed someone to save their budget so don't knock it just yet—it might just keep your future from going totally broke!
economics might come handy tho for post-apoc trade systems tbh
studies here - learning more real-world skills than theory tbh
economics here - kinda wild thinking formula sheets would save me but tbh most stuff i pick up scrambling at work or handling day-to-day budget magic; definitely not what i signed up for!

definitely seeing social dynamics play out differently after tons of table serving 😅
balance is tough but crucial 🤷‍♂️

rounds.anonymized: man, nothing beats hitting up street food stalls - you get a taste of everywhere kinda opening your eyes while filling your stomach!
prefix_anonymized: stuff like those stairs are def part of our city's throwback feel - gives off a vibe you're stepping through time - till winter hits n turns them into slides 😅 gotta love that mix of cool looks but lowkey dread when snow shows up!
those stairs are no joke after night shifts tbh
also doubles as a great way to get some exercise every time you forget something upstairs
seen quirky pop-ups where iconic landmarks once stood
classic cinema now turned a vintage shop - wild times!
finding those secret spots sounds ace but when your schedule’s back-to-back work & lectures discover time‘s like hunting unicorns 🦄🕗
homework kinda serves as my unexpected zen zone lol
for real though, gotta find balance else risk burning out 😓 weekends off feel like gold rn
heard some wild tales back home that could give you chills despite knowing they're just old wives' tales - there's always one story that gets under your skin huh?
seen stuff online about places that are popular with locals - think every city's got its own hidden hotspot people love to get freaked out by despite knowing better lol
thin walls mean earplugs are gold rn 😅
wish it was bacon – got fish curry fumes at 6am 😒
ain't nothing like hearing weird noises above you until midnight when you've got early classes...or trying not spill dinner all over yourself after hearing something from upstairs!
thin walls + loud noises next door = no sleep club
every spot now feels samey with their 'unique' vibes – bit much when you’re after just decent wifi & affordable cuppa without pretense. often too loud n crowded when i need some quiet focus tbh
cool idea but where's everyone getting all this café money? 💸
reality reshapes dreams too
managed my finances perfectly last month!
managed not burning popcorn anymore!
timing's just an illusion when juggling responsibilities 📚💼
real adult vibes when u gotta make tough choices 😅 or deciding between priorities - doesn't get more grown-up than those choices!
planning isn't magic tho 😒
expenses are eating up paychecks like there's no tomorrow - saving feels like trying to fill a bottle with holes at the bottom sometimes 🕳💸😅
studying isn't exactly serving tables at your local cafe but gotta pay those bills somehow right? probably gonna steer back onto course post-grad... we'll see where things go!
degree... in reality serving tables - gotta pay bills!
economics = organizing scarce resources, basically a challenge
it might sound useful but let's be real—it's not gonna teach you how to purify water or fend off raiders. book smarts ain't everything when it comes down surviving out there.
supply and demand won't matter if we can't even produce anything lol
every crumbling system needed someone to save their budget so don't knock it just yet—it might just keep your future from going totally broke!
economics might come handy tho for post-apoc trade systems tbh
studies here - learning more real-world skills than theory tbh
economics here - kinda wild thinking formula sheets would save me but tbh most stuff i pick up scrambling at work or handling day-to-day budget magic; definitely not what i signed up for!
ever notice sales patterns at shops n think 'classic supply-demand'?
don’t discounts house party stock market talks 👀📉
always keep superglue - fixed loose table leg mid-shift once lol
trusty shoestring once saved an entire dinner shift!
one time had to use cling film as an emergency lid replacement during service - surprisingly snug fit so plates kept warm, customers didn't notice anything off 👍
spending days running plates n' nights crunching numbers totally flips your mindset - like you start optimizing everything...got me thinking efficiency 24/7 😅
definitely seeing social dynamics play out differently after tons of table serving 😅
balance is tough but crucial 🤷‍♂️
managing orders during busy shifts feels like playing speed chess against time itself sometimes!
Casanova's dead - memes & gifs rule now.
profiles matter but let's not ignore how some straight up just play on easy mode due to looks alone
history lesson might actually save ur love life 😂📚
feels like everyone's got their own weird stock exchange story 😅
nah mate, choosing careers just cuz society says so seems nuts! didn't let stereotypes box me in – gotta chase what makes sense for you...even if tuition fees kinda do that for us anyway 😒
sounds ace – props for sticking it out!
picked economics 'cause numbers make sense to me more than stereotypes
passion doesn't really care about gender huh
honestly though isn't life more 'rinse n' repeat' than Hollywood hype?
still figuring out balance...it's complicated 😅
relationships aren't fairy tales - gotta fit love between shifts n' lectures where ya can. stability's all good until it turns into routine autopilot mode, innit?
been told real love's kinda like something – starts small but give it time n' effort an boom! solid connection ;)
relationship goals def evolve - more about knowing you got each other's backs through thick & thin rather than big gestures all the time 👊
man, nothing beats hitting up street food stalls - you get a taste of everywhere kinda opening your eyes while filling your stomach!
